description: Short labeled US ATC snippets used as CommSight's on-device performance check (proof-of-life) and Replay demo. Chosen brief (~3-5 s) so the check runs in seconds, and drawn from the domain the shipped small-v2 model is fine-tuned for.
source: CommSight US human-verified gold test set (2026-06 scraping runs). US live-ATC feeds; references human-corrected.

snippets.reference: american 618 you can continue down to victor
san francisco tower mission 699 inbound ils 28r
